rows.name: Ask Nan if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev056001_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nan about himself.

rows.label: tev056001_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Nan if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev056001_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Nan about the Growth attack.

rows.label: tev056001_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nan about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056001_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Nan about the Growth attack.

rows.label: tev056001_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Nan about Nopon history.

rows.label: tev056001_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Nan about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nan great and mighty Nopon
elder. Leader of all Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0002
rows.name: So bow! Kneel! Grovel before Nan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Or at least that is what Nan used to say until
all aides of Nan gradually abandoned him. Mo! Nan
needs to assert authority with more...authority![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0008
rows.name:
Kaka turned out to be good leader.
Kaka told Nan about great human city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0009
rows.name:
Much safer here than old
stomping ground of Nan. Plus
way more people to sell to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nan went ahead and told ALL
friends to move to city, but
none came. Very strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0011
rows.name: So sad. Does no one love Nan anymore?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Grrph! *cough* *wheeze* Nan
feeling lousy these days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0021
rows.name:
Nan tried to convince friends to come live in
city, but friends called Nan cowardly geezerpon
who only cares about own safety! *sniff*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0022
rows.name:
Nan not get it. What is wrong about
leaving behind dangers of caravan for
better life with human friends?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0023
rows.name:
Young, beautiful Nopon have all abandoned
Nan. Now Nan not even have cuties to grope.
It is fate worse than death! Mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0027
rows.name:
Grrph! *cough* *wheeze* Nopon across Mira
should all know about illness of Nan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0028
rows.name:
For now, friend can go
ahead and scour planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG0029
rows.name:
But then Nan has tiny little favor to ask
before it too late. *cough* *gurgle*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1030
rows.name: Nan hear all about Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1031
rows.name:
How dare they invade city of kind
friends who snuggle up to Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1032
rows.name:
How dare they threaten marketplace
where friends lap up second-rate
merchandise for first-rate prices![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1033
rows.name:
Er...uh...oops. Pretend Nan not say
that, okay? Nan never take advantage
of kind, discerning friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1037
rows.name:
Nan knows Cauldros caravan will
be in good hands with Pissa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1038
rows.name:
But Nan will never entrust it
to Potepote. That one will never
be successor to mighty Nan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1039
rows.name:
Nan would never have learned how
unreliable Potepote is if friend
had not helped with fireworks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1040
rows.name:
Nan will whip sense into Potepote, then
live out rest of days in retirement
getting tuft massages from Nopon cuties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1045
rows.name:
Mo-mo-mo! Stupid Growth! Nan gave
discount, so why do they attack
city while Nan still in it?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1046
rows.name:
...Mo? Friend looks mad.
Because of discount?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1047
rows.name:
Nopon wheel and deal with ALL potential
customers. That basic commerce![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1048
rows.name:
Of course, Nan will have to
reconsider now that Growth
have made attempt on life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1049
rows.name:
Maybe secret Nopon Safety Tax that Nan
tack on to every purchase needs to be
raised to 75 percent just for Growth. Hrmph![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1055
rows.name:
A-hem! Once upon time, in faraway land,
there lived... There lived... Zzz...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1056
rows.name: *snort* Wh-what? Where...? Oh. Sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1057
rows.name:
History stories from grandmapon of Nan always
dragged on so long. Now Nan automatically
fall asleep while trying to remember them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1058
rows.name:
Long story short—Nan not really
remember any of Nopon history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG1059
rows.name:
But friend can relate, right? Who needs
history? Nan wants to live in NOW![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG2047
rows.name:
Meh... Nan very sad Pissa not here to make
Nan feel refreshed. *cough* *wheeze*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG2048
rows.name:
All Nan have is Ngogo, and Ngogo
not cute or refreshing at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG2049
rows.name:
Potepote? Harrumph! Forgetful
whippersnapper like that would
only work up blood pressure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG2050
rows.name:
...But wait. Nan hear that Pissa work every
night as dancer at place for young people called
"diner." Maybe this is big chance for Nan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056001_MSG2051
rows.name:
Nan can go meet cuties of every
race instead of just Nopon cuties!
Suddenly Nan feel so ALIVE![ST:wait ]
